name: Brev.dev
description: Brev.dev — Cloud dev environments provisioned via CLI with GPU support, dotfiles sync, and VS Code SSH integration.

seo.title: Brev.dev — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Brev.dev: Brev.dev — Cloud dev environments provisioned via CLI with GPU support, dotfiles sync, and VS Code SSH integration.

when_to_use: Provisioning GPU dev environments with one CLI command
Instant cloud dev boxes with VS Code SSH for ML engineers
Sharing reproducible environments via dotfiles and CLI
Running GPU workloads without cloud console overhead
Scaling dev compute from laptop to cloud with a single command

pros: Fast GPU dev environments via CLI
Dotfiles and VS Code SSH sync
cons: Now part of Nvidia, roadmap uncertain
Pricing not cheaper than raw cloud
review.verdict: Convenient GPU sandboxes for ML devs, but post-acquisition direction is worth watching closely.
review.best_for: ML engineers who need ephemeral GPU boxes with VS Code
review.not_for: General web devs who just need cheap CPU dev environments

lock_in.reason: Cloud dev envs, code in Git
